hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && { echo '=== RESUME.md ==='; cat RESUME.md 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo '=== ollama gemma3 ==='; command -v ollama >/dev/null 2>&1 && (ollama list 2>/dev/null | grep -i gemma3 || echo '(not found)') || echo '(ollama not installed)'; echo '=== recent commits ==='; git log --oneline -5; } 2>/dev/null

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$file" | grep -qE '(pipeline|test_pipeline)\.py$' || exit 0; pytest="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/venv/bin/pytest"; [ -x "$pytest" ] && "$pytest" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/test_pipeline.py" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -15 || echo "(pytest not found at $pytest — run: python -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install pytest)"

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '(pipeline|test_pipeline)\.py'); resume=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -cE 'RESUME\.md'); if [ "${changed:-0}" -gt 0 ] && [ "${resume:-0}" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"pipeline changed but RESUME.md not updated — consider updating RESUME.md before ending session"}'; fi
